text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You want to hear… ghost stories? I suppose
there are a few German castles that are said
to be haunted.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps the most famous ones are the tale
of the female knight who still protects her
castle, or the pale woman who wanders
the halls of her abode…

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! So if I went to one of those castles,
I bet I could get a selfie with the ghosts♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wh-Why would you do that?!
Aren't you scared of ghosts?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, well, a ghost should still be able
to see how cute I am, so… Nope! I think
I'll be safe♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The power of cuteness… Ah, now that you
mention it…

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it super common for idols to be
sent to haunted locations for shoots?
What am I gonna dooo?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, ghosts are not real. We need not
fear ghosts that have no corporeal form…

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But zombies… Zombies are a different story.
Far worse than any ghost.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Both of them sound scary to meee!
